description: Compute velocity pseudotime and per-cell velocity quality metrics: scv.tl.velocity_confidence (adds obs['velocity_length'] and obs['velocity_confidence']) and scv.tl.velocity_pseudotime (adds obs['velocity_pseudotime']). Writes the updated .h5ad.
rules: read-only input — writes a new velocity_pseudotime.h5ad under record_store
requires a velocity graph (run the velocity perk first)
model-agnostic — works for any velocity mode, complementary to the dynamical latent_time
limitation: Requires scvelo installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder velocity_pseudotime.h5ad and still passes.
